sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56412" key="kekadh/sw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκᾰδήσω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκάδοντο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκαδών</orth>, <sense id="n56412.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χάζομαι</ref> </xr>:—but for <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκαδήσομαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κήδω</ref> </xr>:—for <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκαδδίχθαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κάδδιχος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεκαδμένος</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καίνυμαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
